name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Added (Unix)
notes: This Building Block detects when a user account is created.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Added (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added
when the event matches LOWER("Application") MATCHES 'useradd|adduser' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: User Account Added (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added
AND when the event matches LOWER("Application") MATCHES 'useradd|adduser' AQL filter query
